## 1. Go West Young Man — 2:07

*Confidence: metadata-informed*

The title borrows Horace Greeley's frontier line, and at just over two
minutes it plays like a miniature journey rather than a destination — a
short, forward-moving instrumental that seems built to open a set rather
than close one.

**Tags:** instrumental, alt-electronic, motion, opener-energy
**YouTube:** not yet confirmed — no video ID on file
**Spotify:** on the artist's current Top Tracks list

---

## 2. Sunshine — 2:33

*Confidence: metadata-informed*

The catalog's flagship cut and the longest track here — a title that
promises warmth without irony, and a runtime long enough to actually
develop that mood instead of just gesturing at it.

**Tags:** instrumental, alt-electronic, warm, flagship
**YouTube:** https://youtube.com/watch?v=dNJgW6oE8ew
**Spotify:** on the artist's current Top Tracks list

---

## 3. Sway — 2:03

*Confidence: metadata-informed*

A title that names a motion, not a feeling — read on its own terms, this is
the one built for the pocket: groove-first, made to move a room rather than
narrate a story.

**Tags:** instrumental, alt-electronic, groove
**YouTube:** https://youtube.com/watch?v=iSTu9kgrmFU
**Spotify:** on the artist's current Top Tracks list

---

## 4. Deep — 1:17

*Confidence: metadata-informed*

One word, one minute seventeen — the shortest full track in the catalog,
which reads less like a song and more like a held breath. An atmosphere
piece rather than a chorus-and-verse structure.

**Tags:** instrumental, alt-electronic, atmospheric, interlude
**YouTube:** https://youtube.com/watch?v=ZLregHRI40E
**Spotify:** on the artist's current Top Tracks list

---

## 5. Harp About It — 0:41

*Confidence: metadata-informed*

The pun in the title is doing double duty — it's very likely a harp-led
sketch, and at forty-one seconds it's exactly that: a sketch, not a single.
The kind of fragment a producer keeps because it's too good to finish and
dilute.

**Tags:** instrumental, harp, sketch, shortest-track
**YouTube:** https://youtube.com/watch?v=hQgNBccj9gg
**Spotify:** on the artist's current Top Tracks list
